    Method
    Description

    ItemRepository.findBySourceApi(NasaSourceApi sourceApi)
    Retrieves all items from a specific NASA API.

    ItemRepository.findBySourceApiAndNasaId(NasaSourceApi sourceApi, String nasaId)
    Finds an item using the external NASA identifier and source API.

    ItemRepository.findByTitleContainingIgnoreCase(String title)
    Performs a case-insensitive title search.

    Performs a paginated title search.
